title: poa alopecurus
intro: Poa alopecurus, also known as meadow cat's tail or cat's tail grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe, western Asia, and northwestern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and treating digestive problems. Poa alopecurus can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
